  "newString": "        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)",
  "oldString": "        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

  "newString": "    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }",
  "oldString": "    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (c) 2023, NVIDIA CORPORATION. License.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include \"tensorrt_llm/common/config.h\"\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <optional>\n#include <string>\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace common\n{\n\nclass QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 7);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8Qdq() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

License.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include \"tensorrt_llm/common/config.h\"\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <optional>\n#include <string>\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace common\n{\n\nclass QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 7);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8Qdq() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if
