{
  "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py",
  "newString": "        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_int8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).",
  "oldString": "        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\n\nimport inspect\nimport os\nfrom functools import cached_property\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Union\n\nimport torch\nfrom torch import nn\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm._mnnvl_utils import MnnvlMemory, MnnvlMoe\nfrom tensorrt_llm._torch.distributed.moe_alltoall import MoeAlltoAll\nfrom tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version\nfrom tensorrt_llm.logger import logger\nfrom tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantAlgo\n\nfrom ...custom_ops.trtllm_gen_custom_ops import \\\n    fp4_block_scale_fake_output_without_finalize\nfrom ...distributed import allgather\nfrom ...expert_statistic import ExpertStatistic\nfrom ...model_config import ModelConfig\nfrom ...utils import ActivationType, AuxStreamType, Fp4QuantizedTensor\nfrom .interface import AlltoallMethodType, MoE, MoEWeightLoadingMode\n\n# isort: off\nfrom .quantization import (\n    DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod, NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEBaseMethod,\n    NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod, W4A8MXFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod,\n    W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod, W4A8MXFP4MXFP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod,\n    W4A8NVFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod, W4A16MXFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod)\n# isort: on\nfrom .routing import BaseMoeRoutingMethod, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod\n\n\nclass TRTLLMGenFusedMoE(MoE):\n    \"\"\"\n    Fused Mixture of Experts (MoE) Layer with performance tuning.\n\n    Args:\n        num_experts (int): Number of experts in the MoE layer.\n        top_k (int): Number of top experts to select for each input token.\n        hidden_size (int): Size of the hidden state.\n        intermediate_size (int): Size of the intermediate state.\n        dtype (Optional[torch.dtype]): Data type for the weights.\n        reduce_results (bool): Whether to reduce the results across devices.\n        model_config (ModelConfig): Configuration object for the model.\n        aux_stream_dict (Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType, torch.cuda.Stream]]): Auxiliary CUDA streams for overlapping.\n\n    MoE torch custom op:\n        Only support min-latency mode now (SM100 Blackwell only).\n        Quant: fp8 block scales quant and nvfp4 quant and w4a16_mxfp4 quant\n            FusedMoE Op: routing(topK, etc.) + scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalize MoeRoute\n\n    FusedMoE module:\n        min-latency mode:\n            dynamic quant + FusedMoe Op\n            equals to: dynamic quant + routing(topK, etc.) + scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalize MoeRoute\n\n    In min-latency mode, setting `reduce_results=False` disables the AllReduce in the FusedMoE module, so any necessary AllReduce operations must be added explicitly in the model definition.\n    AttentionDP should be turned off for min-latency mode.\n\n    When we have redundant expert, we have more weight slots than `num_experts`, in that case, we separate the concepts of expert and slot.\n    Expert is the concept from model's perspective while slot is the concept from model engine's perspective.\n    There should be at lease `num_experts` slots in the model engine. More than that is OK, in that case, some experts may have multiple replicas.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Supported quantization algorithms for TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n    _SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    # Quantization algorithms that support gptoss_style\n    _GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def can_implement(\n        cls,\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo],\n        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if TRTLLMGenFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports SM in {100, 103} and the following quantizations:\n        - NVFP4\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\n        - W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n        - W4A16_MXFP4\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        Does NOT support unquantized mode. Output dtype is hardcoded to bfloat16.\n\n        Args:\n            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)\n            dtype_activation: The activation input data type. Only bfloat16 is supported.\n                See: forward_impl() assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16 (line 722).\n            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.\n                Only supported for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)\n        \"\"\"\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM in {100, 103}\n        if sm_version not in {100, 103}:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM100 or SM103, got SM{sm_version}\"\n            )\n\n        # Check dtype_activation: only bfloat16 is supported\n        if dtype_activation != torch.bfloat16:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports bfloat16 activation, got {dtype_activation}\"\n            )\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does NOT support unquantized mode\n        if quant_algo is None:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support unquantized mode\")\n\n        # Check if quant_algo is supported\n        if quant_algo not in cls._SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        # Check gptoss_style support: only supported for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants\n        if gptoss_style and quant_algo not in cls._GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports gptoss_style (bias/swiglu) only for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants, \"\n                f\"got quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        return True, None\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        num_experts: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        reduce_results: bool = False,\n        model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n        aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType,\n                                       torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.\n        VANILLA,\n        layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        init_load_balancer: bool = True,\n        without_comm: bool = False,\n        activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n    ):\n        super().__init__(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n        if sm_version >= 120:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support SM120 and above.\")\n\n        assert not self.smart_router, \"Smart router is not supported in TRTLLMGenFusedMoE.\"\n\n        # Note: Load balancer initialization is handled by base class _init_load_balancer()\n        # If no load balancer is available, the base class will set:\n        # - self.num_slots = self.num_experts\n        # - self.expert_size_per_partition = self.num_experts // self.ep_size\n        # - self.initial_global_assignments, self.slot_start, self.slot_end, etc.\n\n        # When without_comm=True, skip communication initialization (ConfigurableMoE will handle it)\n        if not without_comm:\n            self.alltoall_method_type = self.select_alltoall_method_type()\n            logger.info_once(\n                f\"{self.__class__.__name__} selects alltoall_method_type {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\",\n                key=\"alltoall_method_type\")\n            self.alltoall_workspace = None\n            self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None\n            self.use_low_precision_combine = False\n            if self.enable_alltoall:\n                self.use_low_precision_combine = model_config.use_low_precision_moe_combine\n\n                if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                    MnnvlMemory.initialize()\n                    self.alltoall_workspace = MnnvlMoe.get_moe_workspaces(\n                        model_config.mapping)\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = MnnvlMoe.get_moe_prepare_workspace(\n                        model_config.mapping)\n                elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                    # Calculate required workspace size\n                    ep_size = self.mapping.moe_ep_size\n                    max_num_tokens = model_config.max_num_tokens\n                    hidden_size = self.hidden_size\n                    dtype = self.dtype or torch.bfloat16\n\n                    workspace_size = MoeAlltoAll.calculate_required_workspace_size(\n                        ep_size,\n                        self.routing_method.experts_per_token,\n                        max_num_tokens,\n                        hidden_size,\n                        dtype,\n                        self.num_experts if self.layer_load_balancer else None,\n                    )\n\n                    self.moe_a2a = MoeAlltoAll(\n                        mapping=self.mapping,\n                        max_num_tokens=model_config.max_num_tokens,\n                        top_k=self.routing_method.experts_per_token,\n                        num_slots=self.num_slots,\n                        workspace_size_per_rank=workspace_size,\n                        num_experts=self.num_experts\n                        if self.layer_load_balancer else None)\n                elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP or self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for TRTLLMGenFusedMoE yet\"\n                    )\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        f\"Unsupported alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\"\n                    )\n        else:\n            # When without_comm=True, set minimal attributes\n            # Communication will be handled by parent wrapper (e.g., ConfigurableMoE)\n            self.alltoall_method_type = AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n            self.alltoall_workspace = None\n            self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None\n            self.use_low_precision_combine = False\n            self.moe_a2a = None\n\n        self._weights_created = False\n        if not model_config.skip_create_weights_in_init:\n            self.create_weights()\n\n    def _to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self,\n                                       activation_type: ActivationType) -> int:\n        if activation_type == ActivationType.Swiglu:\n            return 0\n        elif activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2:\n            return 1\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported activation type: {activation_type}\")\n\n    def select_alltoall_method_type(self) -> AlltoallMethodType:\n        # If no attention DP, no need to use AlltoAll.\n        if self.mapping.dp_size == 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        # AlltoAll cannot support MoE TP.\n        if self.mapping.moe_tp_size != 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        if not MnnvlMemory.supports_mnnvl():\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        all2all_method_type = os.environ.get(\"TRTLLM_FORCE_ALLTOALL_METHOD\")\n        if all2all_method_type is not None:\n            if AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type] in [\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP,\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency\n            ]:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for CutlassFusedMoE yet\"\n                )\n            return AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type]\n\n        # We found that NVLinkOneSided performs better than NCCL AllGather/ReduceScatter,\n        # regardless of the relationship between EP size and topK. We favor NVLinkOneSided for now.\n        # if not self.mapping.moe_ep_size > self.routing_method.experts_per_token:\n        #     return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n        return AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided\n\n    def _supports_load_balancer(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports load balancer.\"\"\"\n        return self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n\n    @cached_property\n    def enable_alltoall(self):\n        \"\"\" enable_alltoall (bool): whether to enable alltoall instead of allgather/reducescatter\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.alltoall_method_type != AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n    def _check_configs(self):\n        assert self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales \\\n            or self.has_nvfp4 or self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 \\\n            or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8, \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scaling, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_int8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 dtypes.\"\n\n        if self.bias or self.swiglu_alpha is not None or self.swiglu_beta is not None or self.swiglu_limit is not None:\n            assert self.has_nvfp4 or self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8, \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports bias/swiglu only for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants.\"\n\n    def _get_quant_method(self):\n        if self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_any_quant(\n                exclude_kv_cache=True):\n            if self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales():\n                return DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_nvfp4():\n                return NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(\n                ) if self.swiglu_alpha is not None or self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEBaseMethod(\n                )\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return W4A16MXFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8NVFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unsupported quantization method by TRTLLMGenFusedMoE: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't support fp16/bf16/fp32 MoE.\")\n\n    def create_weights(self):\n        if self._weights_created:\n            return\n\n        self.quant_method = self._get_quant_method()\n        self.quant_method.create_weights(self)\n\n        self._weights_created = True\n        self._check_configs()\n\n        if (self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8) and not self.bias:\n            self.w3_w1_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w3_w1_weight.shape[0], self.w3_w1_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                           requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w3_w1_bias\", self.w3_w1_bias)\n            self.w2_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w2_weight.shape[0], self.w2_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                        requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w2_bias\", self.w2_bias)\n\n    def load_weights(self,\n                     weights: List[Dict],\n                     allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        assert self._weights_created\n\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        weights = weights[0]\n\n        kargs = {}\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in inspect.getfullargspec(\n                self.quant_method.load_weights).args:\n            kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        self.quant_method.load_weights(self, weights, self.weight_loading_mode,\n                                       **kargs)\n\n    def post_load_weights(self):\n        self.quant_method.post_load_weights(self)\n\n    def quantize_input(self, x, post_quant_comm: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Quantize inputs prior to post-communication (alltoall/allgather) or before MoE computation.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input tensor to quantize\n            post_quant_comm:\n                If True, quantize for post-quant communication path.\n                If False, quantize for non-communication path\n\n        Returns: (x, x_sf) where x_sf is already reshaped to 2D if needed\n\n        For quantization methods that produce scaling factors:\n        - x_sf is reshaped from 1D to 2D: [num_elements] -> [batch_size, ceil_div(hidden_size, scaling_vector_size)]\n        - The 2D shape is required for proper handling in alltoall/allgather operations\n        - scaling_vector_size is typically the group size for block-wise quantization\n        \"\"\"\n        x_sf = None\n        if self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            if post_quant_comm:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant[0])\n            else:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_gate_dequant[0])\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            if post_quant_comm:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_int8_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant[0])\n            else:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_int8_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_gate_dequant[0])\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                assert not x.is_sf_swizzled, \"Fp4QuantizedTensor should not be swizzled before communication\"\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = x.fp4_tensor, x.scaling_factor\n            else:\n                # Apply pre_quant_scale if it exists (for NVFP4_AWQ)\n                # fc31_act_scale shape: (1, hidden_size)\n                # x shape: (num_tokens, hidden_size)\n                if hasattr(\n                        self,\n                        'fc31_act_scale') and self.fc31_act_scale is not None:\n                    x = x * self.fc31_act_scale\n\n                pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n                if pad_size > 0:\n                    x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size, False,\n                    False)\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                x, False, alignment=self.quant_method.input_hidden_alignment)\n            x_row, x_col = x.shape[0], x.shape[1]\n        elif self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            # For SM100+, fp8_quantize_1x128 returns x_sf with shape (blocked_n, num_tokens),\n            # but moe_a2a_dispatch requires all payloads to have first dim = num_tokens.\n            # Transpose x_sf before dispatch and transpose back after receive, but this may\n            # introduce perf regression. So we don't supports post_quant_comm for fp8_block_scales.\n            # TODO: Consider remove the constraint of the OneSided AlltoAll\n            pass\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                x, 1.0 / self.fc31_input_scale)\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"unsupported quantization mode for post communication: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n            )\n\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            x_sf = x_sf.view(x_row, -1)\n\n        return x, x_sf\n\n    def supports_moe_output_in_alltoall_workspace(self):\n        return self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8\n\n    def run_moe(\n        self,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,\n        token_final_scales: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n        x_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        router_logits: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, tuple]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run MoE computation with TRTLLMGen backend.\n\n        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).\n\n        Args:\n            # Standard MoE interface parameters:\n            x: Input hidden states (may be pre-quantized)\n            token_selected_experts: Expert IDs [num_tokens, top_k]. If EPLB is enabled,\n                                    this represents expert slots [num_tokens, top_k] instead.\n            token_final_scales: Final scaling factors for each token\n            x_sf: Input scale factors (optional, for certain quantization schemes)\n\n            # TRTLLMGen-specific additional parameters:\n            router_logits: Router logits for integrated routing in some kernels.\n                          Should be None if routing has already been done (e.g., post_quant_comm).\n            do_finalize: Whether to finalize the output. If False, returns intermediate\n                        results (tuple) for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 schemes.\n            moe_output: Pre-allocated output buffer from workspace (optional).\n                       Used for mnnvlthroughput alltoall backend to avoid extra copies.\n\n        Returns:\n            If do_finalize=True: final_hidden_states tensor\n            If do_finalize=False: tuple of intermediate outputs (for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8)\n        \"\"\"\n        # Extract routing parameters from routing_method\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n            routing_bias = self.routing_method.e_score_correction_bias\n            n_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.n_group\n            topk_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.topk_group\n            routed_scaling_factor = self.routing_method.routing_impl.routed_scaling_factor\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n            routing_bias = None\n            n_group = None\n            topk_group = None\n            routed_scaling_factor = None\n\n        routing_bias = routing_bias if router_logits is not None else None\n\n        # Ensure x_sf is 2D before flattening\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            assert len(\n                x_sf.shape\n            ) == 2, f\"x_sf should be 2D tensor, got shape {x_sf.shape}\"\n            x_sf = x_sf.flatten()\n\n        if self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            assert do_finalize, \"fp8_block_scale_moe_runner does not support do_finalize=False\"\n            # fp8_block_scale_moe_runner needs 2D shape for x_sf and only support SM100+\n            if x_sf is None:\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_quantize_1x128(x)\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            factor = 1 if self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else 2\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // factor\n            act_type = self._to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self.activation_type)\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=act_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n                # Slice output if it was padded\n                if final_hidden_states.shape[1] > self.hidden_size:\n                    final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                              hidden_size].contiguous(\n                                                              )\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.bf16_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=0,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.e4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.fc31_input_dequant,\n                self.fc31_input_gate_dequant,\n                self.fc2_input_dequant,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8:\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.int8_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.fc31_input_dequant,\n                self.fc31_input_gate_dequant,\n                self.fc2_input_dequant,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n\n            mxfp8_x, sf = x, x_sf\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            result = torch.ops.trtllm.mxe4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n                output=moe_output,\n            )\n\n            # When output is provided, use it directly as the result\n            # (custom op returns empty tensor to avoid PyTorch aliasing constraints)\n            final_hidden_states = moe_output if moe_output is not None else result\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scaling, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_int8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 dtypes.\"\n            )\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n        # Get top_k for routing (other routing parameters are extracted inside run_moe)\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = (self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n                                    and not self.enable_alltoall)\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n\n        x_sf = None\n        token_selected_experts = None\n        token_final_scales = None\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None\n        # Determine if this is first/last call (TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't use chunking)\n        is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n        is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n\n        if post_quant_comm:\n            self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n                router_logits)\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts.to(torch.int32)\n            if token_final_scales is not None:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n\n            # Route tokens to slots\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n\n            # Update expert statistics\n            ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n            ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n            # Use routed slots for subsequent processing\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_slots\n\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None, \"all_rank_num_tokens required for alltoall\"\n\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_experts,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n            else:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                else:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                alltoall_info, gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_prepare_without_allgather(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts,\n                    self.num_slots,\n                    top_k,\n                )\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv(\n                    [x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales],\n                    alltoall_info,\n                    self.alltoall_workspace,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                torch.ops.trtllm.memset_expert_ids(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    alltoall_info.recv_rank_count_cumsum,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    top_k,\n                    -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                payloads = []\n                payloads.append(x)\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    payloads.append(x_sf)\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 2\n                else:\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 1\n                payloads.append(token_selected_experts)\n                payloads.append(token_final_scales)\n\n                loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                if self.layer_load_balancer and is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                if loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_experts,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=\n                        -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                        eplb_local_stats=loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    )\n                    gathered_stats = self.moe_a2a._state.eplb_gathered_stats\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_stats)\n                else:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_experts,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=\n                        -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                    )\n\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    x_recv, x_sf_recv, token_selected_experts_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                    x_sf = x_sf_recv.view(-1, x_sf_recv.shape[-1])\n                else:\n                    x_recv, token_selected_experts_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                x = x_recv.view(-1, x_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_selected_experts_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_final_scales_recv.shape[-1])\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        elif run_post_quant_allgather:\n            if x_sf is not None:\n                assert len(\n                    x_sf.shape\n                ) == 2, \"The hidden states scaling factor should be 2D tensor before allgather\"\n            x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = allgather(\n                [x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales],\n                self.mapping,\n                dim=0,\n                sizes=None if use_dp_padding else all_rank_num_tokens)\n        else:\n            # No communication path: use non-post-quant-comm quantization\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x, post_quant_comm=False)\n\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n        use_workspace_output = False\n        # TODO: use_workspace_output only supports w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 (gpt-oss) for now\n        if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided and self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            moe_output = self.moe_a2a.get_combine_payload_tensor_in_workspace(\n                runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, self.hidden_size, torch.bfloat16)\n            use_workspace_output = True\n\n        # Call the extracted run_moe interface\n        # Determine router_logits based on post_quant_comm\n        router_logits_arg = None if post_quant_comm else router_logits\n\n        final_hidden_states = self.run_moe(\n            x=x,\n            token_selected_experts=token_selected_experts,\n            token_final_scales=token_final_scales,\n            x_sf=x_sf,\n            # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE extra parameters\n            router_logits=router_logits_arg,\n            do_finalize=do_finalize,\n            moe_output=moe_output,\n        )\n\n        self._load_balancer_start_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        # Combine results if using alltoall\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                if alltoall_info is not None:\n                    final_hidden_states = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_combine(\n                        final_hidden_states,\n                        alltoall_info,\n                        self.alltoall_workspace,\n                        ep_rank=self.ep_rank,\n                        ep_size=self.ep_size,\n                        top_k=top_k,\n                        use_low_precision_combine=self.\n                        use_low_precision_combine,\n                        token_count=token_count,\n                    )\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                # If use_workspace_output=True, the MoE result is already in workspace\n                # Otherwise, we need to reshape and pass it\n                if use_workspace_output:\n                    # Workspace payload is returned as 2D [ep_size * max_tokens, hidden]; reshape to 3D.\n                    hidden = final_hidden_states.shape[-1]\n                    payload = moe_output.view(self.ep_size,\n                                              runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                                              hidden)\n                    final_hidden_states = self.moe_a2a.combine(\n                        payload,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        payload_in_workspace=True)\n                else:\n                    hidden = final_hidden_states.shape[-1]\n                    payload = final_hidden_states.view(\n                        self.ep_size, runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, hidden)\n                    final_hidden_states = self.moe_a2a.combine(\n                        payload,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        payload_in_workspace=False)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        final_hidden_states = self.reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n            final_hidden_states,\n            all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens,\n            use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n        )\n\n        self._load_balancer_done_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        if use_dp_padding:\n            rank = self.parallel_rank\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:\n                                                      all_rank_num_tokens[rank]]\n\n        # Update repeat index for load balancer\n        if self.layer_load_balancer:\n            self.repeat_idx = 0 if self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1 else self.repeat_idx + 1\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_fake(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, List[torch.Tensor]]:\n        if do_finalize:\n            # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports bfloat16 output\n            return super().forward_fake(x,\n                                        router_logits,\n                                        do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                                        output_dtype=torch.bfloat16,\n                                        all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens,\n                                        use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n                                        **kwargs)\n        else:\n            is_deepseek_v3_routing = isinstance(self.routing_method,\n                                                DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod)\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k if is_deepseek_v3_routing else self.routing_method.top_k\n            routing_bias = self.routing_method.e_score_correction_bias if is_deepseek_v3_routing else None\n            return fp4_block_scale_fake_output_without_finalize(\n                x,\n                self.num_experts,\n                top_k,\n                routing_bias,\n            )\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "         This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different",
        "         quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,",
        "-        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).",
        "+        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_int8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).",
        " ",
        "         Args:",
        "             # Standard MoE interface parameters:"
      ],

97. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/test_w4a8_mxfp4_int8.py << 'EOF'\n#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')\n\n# Test 1: Check QuantAlgo enum\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantAlgo\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 1: QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists\")\nassert hasattr(QuantAlgo, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantAlgo\"\nprint(f\"  Value: {QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8}\")\n\n# Test 2: Check QuantMode enum\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantMode\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 2: QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists\")\nassert hasattr(QuantMode, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantMode\"\nprint(f\"  Value: {QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8.value}\")\n\n# Test 3: Create QuantMode with new parameter\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 3: Create QuantMode with use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True\")\nqm = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)\nassert qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), \"has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8() returned False\"\nprint(f\"  QuantMode value: {qm.value}\")\n\n# Test 4: Check from_quant_algo method\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 4: Create QuantMode from QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\nqm2 = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\nassert qm2.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), \"from_quant_algo didn't set INT8 mode\"\nprint(f\"  QuantMode value: {qm2.value}\")\n\n# Test 5: Check has_mxfp4 includes the new mode\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 5: has_mxfp4() includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\nassert qm2.has_mxfp4(), \"has_mxfp4() should return True for W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\"\n\n# Test 6: Check has_any_quant includes the new mode\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 6: has_any_quant() includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\nassert qm2.has_any_quant(), \"has_any_quant() should return True for W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\"\n\n# Test 7: Check to_dict() includes the new mode\nprint(\"\u2713 Test 7: to_dict() includes 'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8'\")\nd = qm2.to_dict()\nassert 'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8' in d, \"enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {

Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/implementation_summary.md << 'EOF'\n# W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 Quantization Mode Implementation Summary\n\n## Overview\nAdded support for a new quantization mode `W4A8_MXFP4_INT8` (4-bit MXFP4 weights with INT8 activations) targeting Blackwell GPUs.\n\n## Files Modified\n\n### 1. Python Quantization Enums\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py`\n- Added `W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()` to `QuantAlgo` class (line 46)\n- Added `W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()` to `QuantMode` class (line 101)\n- Added `has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8()` method to check if mode is set\n- Updated `has_mxfp4()` to include the new variant\n- Updated `has_any_quant()` to include the new variant\n- Added `use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8` parameter to `from_description()` method\n- Added handling in `from_quant_algo()` for converting enum to mode\n- Updated `to_dict()` to include the new mode in dictionary representation\n\n### 2. C++ Quantization Enums\n**File:** `/workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h`\n- Added `w4a8Mxfp4Int8()` static method (bit 16)\n- Added `hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8()` check method\n- Updated `fromDescription()` method signature with new parameter\n- Updated `fromQuantAlgo()` to handle \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\" string\n- Updated all utility methods to accept the new parameter\n\n### 3. Model Configuration\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/model_config.py`\n- Added \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\" to `supported_algos` dictionary in `override_quant_algo()`\n\n### 4. Cutlass MOE Backend\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py`\n- Added support in `_QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE` for SM {100, 103} with float16, bfloat16, float32 dtypes\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod` to imports\n- Added handling in `_get_quant_method()` to instantiate the new method\n- Updated documentation to include the new mode\n\n### 5. TRTLLMGen MOE Backend\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py`\n- Added mode to `_SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS` set\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod` to imports\n- Updated `_check_configs()` to validate the new mode\n- Updated `_get_quant_method()` to instantiate the new method\n- Added quantization handling for pre/post communication phases\n- Added MOE kernel runner call with appropriate operators\n- Updated documentation and error messages\n\n### 6. MOE Interface\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/interface.py`\n- Added `has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8` property to check if mode is enabled\n\n### 7. Quantization Methods\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py`\n- Added `FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4INT8` NamedTuple for scale management\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod` class extending `MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod`\n  - Implements weight creation with input scale parameters\n  - Implements quantization scale loading\n  - Implements scale setup for Cutlass backend\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod` class extending `MXFP4WeightTRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod`\n  - Implements weight creation with dequant parameters\n  - Implements quantization scale loading\n  - Implements scale setup for TRTLLMGen backend\n\n## Key Features\n\n### Hardware Support\n- Targets Blackwell GPUs (SM 100, 103)\n- Supports both Cutlass and TRTLLMGen fusion backends\n\n### Supported Configurations\n- Weight precision: 4-bit MXFP4\n- Activation precision: INT8\n- Compatible dtypes: float16, bfloat16, float32 (float32 for Cutlass only)\n\n### Validation\n- Build-time enum value synchronization between Python and C++\n- Proper kernel selection based on GPU architecture\n- Clear error messages for unsupported configurations\n\n## Testing\nAll Python files pass syntax validation. Implementation follows existing patterns from W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 mode.\n\n## Backward Compatibility\nNo breaking changes. All existing quantization modes continue to work as before.\nEOF\ncat /tmp/implementation_summary.md\n",
  "description": "Create implementation summary"
}

TRTLLMGen MOE Backend\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py`\n- Added mode to `_SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS` set\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod` to imports\n- Updated `_check_configs()` to validate the new mode\n- Updated `_get_quant_method()` to instantiate the new method\n- Added quantization handling for pre/post communication phases\n- Added MOE kernel runner call with appropriate operators\n- Updated documentation and error messages\n\n### 6. Quantization Methods\n**File:** `/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py`\n- Added `FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4INT8` NamedTuple for scale management\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod` class extending `MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod`\n  - Implements weight creation with input scale parameters\n  - Implements quantization scale loading\n  - Implements scale setup for Cutlass backend\n- Added `W4A8MXFP4INT8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod` class extending `MXFP4WeightTRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod`\n  - Implements weight creation with dequant parameters\n  - Implements quantization scale loading\n  - Implements scale setup for TRTLLMGen backend\n\n## Key Features\n\n### Hardware Support\n- Targets Blackwell GPUs (SM 100, 103)\n- Supports both Cutlass and TRTLLMGen fusion backends\n\n### Supported Configurations\n- Weight precision: 4-bit MXFP4\n- Activation precision: INT8\n- Compatible dtypes: float16, bfloat16, float32 (float32 for Cutlass only)\n\n### Validation\n- Build-time enum value synchronization between Python and C++\n- Proper kernel selection based on GPU architecture\n- Clear error messages for unsupported configurations\n\n## Testing\nAll Python files pass syntax validation. 108. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "python3 << 'EOF'\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\n\n# Simulate the Python enum to verify bit ordering\nclass TestQuantMode(IntFlag):\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()           # 1\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()           # 2\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()            # 4\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()            # 8\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()              # 16\n    PER_GROUP = auto()              # 32\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()          # 64\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()           # 128\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()                # 256\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()            # 512\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()      # 1024\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()            # 2048\n    NVFP4 = auto()                  # 4096\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()         # 8192\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()         # 16384 (1u << 14)\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()         # 32768 (1u << 15)\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()       # 65536 (1u << 16)\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()        # 131072 (1u << 17)\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()            # 262144 (1u << 18)\n    COUNT = auto()                  # 524288 (1u << 19)\n\n# Check the mapping\nprint(\"Bit position mapping:\")\nprint(f\"W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:     {TestQuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8.value:7} = 1u << {(TestQuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8.value - 1).bit_length()}\")\nprint(f\"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:     {TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8.value:7} = 1u << {(TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8.value - 1).bit_length()}\")\nprint(f\"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:   {TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8.value:7} = 1u << {(TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8.value - 1).bit_length()}\")\nprint(f\"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:    {TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8.value:7} = 1u << {(TestQuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8.value - 1).bit_length()}\")\nprint(f\"W4A16_MXFP4:        {TestQuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4.value:7} = 1u << {(TestQuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4.value - 1).bit_length()}\")\n\nprint(\"\\nVerifying C++ mapping should match:\")\nprint(\"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:     1u << 14\")\nprint(\"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:   1u << 15\")\nprint(\"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:    1u << 16\")\nprint(\"W4A16_MXFP4:        1u << 17\")\nEOF\n",
  "description": "Verify bit position mapping"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Bit position mapping:\nW4A8_NVFP4_FP8:       16384 = 1u << 14\nW4A8_MXFP4_FP8:       32768 = 1u << 15\nW4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:     65536 = 1u << 16\nW4A8_MXFP4_INT8:     131072 = 1u << 17\nW4A16_MXFP4:         262144 = 1u << 18\n\nVerifying C++ mapping should match:\nW4A8_MXFP4_FP8:     1u << 14\nW4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:   1u << 15\nW4A8_MXFP4_INT8:    1u << 16\nW4A16_MXFP4:        1u << 17"
}
